author: rails.finance
subtitle: We've retired the green 'R'-with-a-dot badge for a more abstract, linear R in neutral tones. The new mark is deliberately plain — Rails is a conveyor of information, not the subject of it. Keeping the branding quiet lets the protocol and asset icons that live on the platform, the things you actually came to see, take the foreground. It also gives Rails room to grow across many protocols without any one brand colour fighting the data.

author: rails.finance
content: Applied to steward the EF Neutral DeFi Risk Intelligence Aggregator
subtitle: Our response to the Ethereum Foundation's OpenRisk RFP. Neutral Risk is our open-source aggregator showing what every major risk feed says about a protocol, side by side — no scores of our own.

author: rails.finance
content: Soft launch: the Aave V4 explorer is live.
subtitle: Browse multi-spoke positions with chain-truth health factors, liquidation prices, net APY, and full event timelines.
